name: Razer
collaborationStyle: peripheral review, setup showcase, esports integration
notes: Strong creator program; brand recognition does a lot of the selling for you

name: PlayStation
collaborationStyle: game launch campaign, console review, exclusive gameplay integration
notes: Reserved for large channels; primarily agency-mediated; strong fit for AAA game and console review creators

name: Xbox / Microsoft Gaming
collaborationStyle: Game Pass showcase, console review, exclusive title launch
notes: Game Pass is a highly sponsorable product; more creator-accessible than PlayStation for mid-tier channels

name: ASUS ROG
collaborationStyle: PC build showcase, peripheral review, esports integration
notes: Republic of Gamers brand; strong fit for PC building, hardware review, and esports creators

name: GFuel
collaborationStyle: drink integration, custom flavor collab, discount code
notes: Iconic gaming energy drink; one of the most widely distributed gaming sponsorships; easy integration

name: SteelSeries
collaborationStyle: peripheral review, setup showcase, competitive gaming integration
notes: Strong alternative to Razer for peripheral sponsorships; very active creator program

name: Corsair
collaborationStyle: PC build integration, peripheral review, RGB setup showcase
notes: Covers peripherals, PC components, and streaming gear; wide product range makes for flexible integrations

name: NordVPN
collaborationStyle: mid-roll segment, gaming security story, evergreen integration
notes: Extremely common gaming channel sponsor; easy evergreen integration regardless of content sub-niche

name: Epidemic Sound
collaborationStyle: music licensing story, content creation workflow, mid-roll segment
notes: Royalty-free music platform; universal fit for any gaming creator who produces edited video content

name: Secretlab
collaborationStyle: gaming chair review, setup tour, long-session comfort story
notes: Leading gaming chair brand; extremely active sponsorship program with wide creator range

name: Backbone
collaborationStyle: mobile gaming review, controller showcase, travel gaming
notes: Mobile game controller growing rapidly; good fit for console and mobile crossover creators

name: Glorious
collaborationStyle: mouse/keyboard review, modding showcase, competitive setup content
notes: Cult gaming peripheral brand popular with enthusiasts; ideal for creators covering competitive or modding content

name: NZXT
collaborationStyle: PC build showcase, case review, clean aesthetic setup
notes: PC cases and components brand; strong fit for creators who prioritize clean aesthetic PC builds

name: Ironside Computers
collaborationStyle: custom PC showcase, build reveal, gaming setup tour
notes: Custom PC builder with an active creator program; good fit for gaming setup and PC build channels

name: Xtrfy
collaborationStyle: peripheral review, esports gear showcase, competitive setup
notes: Esports peripheral brand from Sweden; niche but loyal following among competitive FPS players

name: Mobalytics
collaborationStyle: rank improvement story, analytics demo, coaching integration
notes: Gaming analytics and coaching platform; ideal for creators focused on ranked improvement in games like LoL, Valorant, or TFT
